title: Floralcraft 80cm x 100m Tinted Cellophane, Florists Flowers Hampers Gifts Wrapping with Tinted (Lime)
features: A premium quality cellophane wrap made from high-quality food-grade material. It easily helps elevate any gift or bouquet, no matter the occasion
Cellophane wrap roll is safe, non-toxic, beautiful and hygienic. Because it is 100% food-grade safe food, it can keep your food or bouquets fresh and clean
Can be used to wrap presents, flowers, candy, artwork, hampers, etc. You can wrap it separately or match it with other beautiful paper to make your gift look more shinny.
The cellophane wrap roll helps make it durable. The higher durability resists rips and tears and helps provide additional support for baskets, gifts, treats, toys, and more.
Just cut the cellophane wrap roll to the size you want, cover it on the gift, and then wrap your gift bouquet or fruit
description: Add a touch of elegance and vibrancy to your floral arrangements, hampers, and gifts with the Floralcraft 80cm x 100m Tinted Cellophane in Lime. This high-quality cellophane roll is perfect for professional florists, gift wrapping, and creative projects, providing a beautiful and protective layer for your products. Measuring 80cm in width and 100m in length, this tinted cellophane offers ample coverage for a variety of uses. The vibrant Lime tint adds a striking and festive look, making it ideal for wrapping bouquets, hampers, gift baskets, and more. Whether you’re preparing gifts for special occasions or creating stunning floral displays, Floralcraft tinted cellophane enhances the presentation and ensures your items stand out. Crafted from durable and flexible material, this cellophane is easy to cut and shape, allowing for precise and creative wrapping. Its transparent yet Colourful design allows the contents to be visible while adding a pop of Colour, making your gifts and arrangements more attractive. Key Features: Generous Size: Measures 80cm in width and 100m in length, providing ample cellophane for multiple wrapping projects. Tinted Lime Colour: Adds a vibrant and festive touch to any gift or floral arrangement. High-Quality Material: Made from durable and flexible cellophane, easy to cut and shape for precise wrapping. Versatile Use: Perfect for florists, gift wrapping, hampers, gift baskets, and various creative projects. Elegant Presentation: Enhances the look of bouquets, gifts, and hampers, making them more appealing. Protective Layer: Offers a protective barrier that keeps your items clean and intact while showcasing them beautifully. Transparent Design: Allows the contents to be visible while adding a decorative touch with its tinted Colour. Enhance your gift wrapping and floral arrangements with the Floralcraft Tinted Cellophane in Lime. Perfect for special occasions, holidays, and creative projects, this cellophane roll ensures your gifts and displays look their best. Order now and add a touch of Colour and elegance to your wrapping needs!
